feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: shipping rant x deltarune
entry.content: > "ship" scene > obvious fake out > forced by player through violence > neither character has romantic intentions > one is actually terrified > glorified as genuine romance Fandom shippers are genuinely delusional and unstable. They will ignore or invent any subtext, character trait, or story beat to keep their fantasy alive. They deserve a court ordered dopamine detox and probably some relationship counselling. When called out enough they backtrack to "It's my head canon! It's my theory!" becau

entry.title: /b/ Random: Launching on /b/ cuz Product Hunt suuuuuucks Join us at: deskmate.online or: des…
entry.content: Launching on /b/ cuz Product Hunt suuuuuucks Join us at: deskmate.online or: deskmate.jp.net We’re building fully customizable desktop companions: characters that will live on your screen, react to your workflow, and help with what you’re doing. Remember ウカガカ (Ukagaka)? That’s like that but 1000x better. Right now we’re trying to see what happens when your desktop gets a little more personality. Are we summoning the shoggoth? Maybe. Ask us anything.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Matrix
entry.content: This movie is fucking fascinating to me. It's clearly a totally pozzed leftist power fantasy and total plagiarist collage of 80's and 90's Japanese sci-fi anime and manga. But inadverntatley it completely birthed conspiracy culture due to the singular power of its iconography (a total and utter cosmic fluke given the would-be trannies who "made" it, or ripped it off from some straight white male's script) and is directly responsible for the alt-right, anti-woke and groypers/schizos.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Mortal Kombat II (2026)
entry.content: Just watched this as a MK casual. Only read the wiki for the first one. Honestly not bad for what amounts to a B-flick. The Scorpion vs. Shadow fight was sick and Karl Urban did great as Johnny Cage. Shao Khan didn't really feel like a world-ending threat without the immortality hack, though. Also wish we got to see Raiden fuck some people up. Liu Kang vs. Kung Lao & Shao Khan was also pretty sweet. On the other hand, some of the fights felt kind of lame or weakly choreographed. For example, Jax

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: What are we going to do with our image collections from 4chan? I have endless fo…
entry.content: What are we going to do with our image collections from 4chan? I have endless folders within folders of shit saved here from over the last 16 years. Do you have a plan for your image folders? How would one go about making money from their image collections? I'm curious to try and figure out something to do. My stomach hurts so bad from eating breakfast. It's not agreeing with me at all. I feel like I'm going to have some very bad diarrhea today. How's everyone else doing?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: SCREENS IN THE DARK ARE PROBABLY FUCKING US UP REALLY BAD
entry.content: Try it out yourself I just noticed this: Step 1: Look at screen in the dark. I was on my lowest brightness dark mode orange light phone Step 2: Turn away from the screen and close your eyes. Ensure contrast by cupping your eyes with your hands Result: your eyes/vision will begin to flicker and flash like a motherfucker despite there being no light present I am also reminded that LED lights flicker and flash a shitton and cause eye degradation and stress. So dark mode means SHIT when it comes to

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The previous thread has died >>109052535 since I haven't managed to reply in tim…
entry.content: The previous thread has died >>109052535 since I haven't managed to reply in time. Reposting from the previous OP: ==== A short preamble. I got interested in a 2009 game Solium Infernum made entirely in Adobe Director. To better understand its code and potentially to mod its graphic assets, I spent some time searching for decompilers, and found two great tools: - https://github.com/ProjectorRays/Pr ojectorRays/releases which produces readable .dir files from protected Director .cxt format which

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If there ain't gonna be whites on the streets, I'm gonna laugh at you
entry.content: I'll not align with people who hate me even after saying I wanted to be white. The toll you're going to pay will be your extermination through interbreeding and mass immigration. Also, if I'm not white, why should I care about you? I hope that all of your kind disappear. I hate you more than niggers. They think our eugenist plan is just mordernation. Blondes, blue eyes, gingers, brown hair, white skin, and green eyes will all disappear. You deserve if for not making me be born white.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: In the rural, white trash little town I grew up in there was this local color gu…
entry.content: In the rural, white trash little town I grew up in there was this local color guy everyone knew that they called "Pokemon Charlie." He was this guy who had some sort of intellectual disability who was obssed with Pokemon. You would see him walking around playing his gameboy various places around town and everyone tried their best to be nice to him. It was less well known that if you brought a pack of Pokemon cards to the football game on a Friday night, Pokemon Charlie would give you a sloppy bl

entry.title: /o/ Auto: scritch
entry.content: scratched my car door sill. should i get it repainted, or should i just paint it over with rust-neutralizing paint? i dont really care for it to look pretty which i know it wont after rust neutralizing paint but it seems the most sound economically a whole package of the paint is less than 1/10th the cost of repainting it, and repainting it seems to be 1/3rd the cost of replacing the whole sill thoughts?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Linux

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA has always been shit
entry.content: What does this franchise offer in terms of a fulfilling experience? You play as a criminal who steals cars, kills people, and sleeps with prostitutes. There's no thematic value here, no great narratives or any kind of substance. Even the gameplay is bare bones and boring. A lifeless open world modelled after real American shitholes coupled with linear fetch quest story missions. GTA is the definition of soulless mediocrity, and the fact that so many are excited for the next instalment in this ab

entry.title: /int/ International: Quiero que hechen a España de la Union Europea.
entry.content: Lo mas rápido posible. No lo digo en broma. (1) He ido al INEM/SEPE. El inútil de allí se equivoca copiando mi numero de teléfono, nombre, NIE, email. No saben leer o escribir pero cobran su sueldo, funcionarios los llaman. (2) Otra: Mando mi CV a una ETT en Holanda para largarme de una puta vez de aquí. Los genios de allí, al ver que vivo en España y hablo Ingles, ponen a una recruiter Española para entrevistarme. En Ingles. "jellou, hau ar yu?" "¿Que?" "claramente usted no sabe ingles". FUERA

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Sarah-N-Tuned complains the McDonalds struts on the "new" Toyota Rav 4 limit the…
entry.content: Sarah-N-Tuned complains the McDonalds struts on the "new" Toyota Rav 4 limit the off-road handling (I can relate to this complaint), and says the electronic AWD with no mechanical linkage front to back is disconcerting. She praises the steering feel, however. https://youtu.be/xw73zcOzXSI Also, her outfits need more color. Every episode, beige, white, pale blue, grey.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: /ORG/ - Offroad General
entry.content: Welcome to 4chan's Offroad General! On July 4th, 2026, we mark 250 years of American freedom. Conquering untamed trails in 4x4s is our manifest destiny. Just like Lewis and Clark, we conquer the unknown, tackling the most unforgiving terrain that our beautiful country has to offer. Other countries will never have the trails and trucks that Americans are blessed with. Give me liberty, or give me death. Previous thread: >>28936348

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Chicago appreciation thread
entry.content: Terry Kath deserves all the praise he gets but he's had more than plenty. Can we take a second to acknowledge that literally every member of this band was a fucking monster musician? Genuinely one of the most OP lineups of all time in both raw talent and exciting presentation. Danny Seraphine is one of the most underrated drummers in rock. Even Peter Cetera, however anyone feels about his later adult contemporary slop, was still a really good bassist. Also RIP Walter Parazaider. https://www.yout

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Are recalls pointless now? >20 years ago >some vehicles engines explode or drive…
entry.content: Are recalls pointless now? >20 years ago >some vehicles engines explode or drivers die >announcement of a huge vehicle recall >vehicle has some insane issue that is complex to fix >have to bring it to shop and leave it for a few weeks >today >announce of a huge vehicle recall out of nowhere >vehicle is has a small UI bug (icon is 5% smaller than regulations) >car auto updates overnight while sleeping >nobody was ever harmed or impacted

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8385 CAM ON FLG. WRITE SOME FACKING POSTS Edition Previo…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8385 CAM ON FLG. WRITE SOME FACKING POSTS Edition Previous Thread: >>83519009 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share a
